title: dysoxylum beddomei
intro: Dysoxylum beddomei, also known as the Beddome's Dysoxylum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum beddomei include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Dysoxylum beddomei can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
